images.depicts: heavy motion-blur of a shaggy animal sprinting through dust, indistinct
images.issue: very abstract/blurred — reads as 'motion' more than a specific animal, but matches the 'blur of joyful motion, all energy' artNote intent

images.depicts: close-up brown shaggy dog sprinting head-on, ears back, tongue out, motion blur
tabby cat mid-leap, all four paws off ground, small bird flushing up ahead
white duck powering across water with bright splash wake
bee with wings out, musical notes rising, eyes shut
wooden peg-doll boy in red shirt surrounded by scattered toys, grinning
fluffy sheep curled over an open book, eyes closed, one hoof on page
images.issue: reads as sleeping-on-the-book rather than actively reading, but matches artNote ('absorbed') closely enough

images.depicts: potato with sunglasses reclining in a striped beach deckchair on sand
wooden peg-doll figure swimming underwater, head breaking the surface
brown wren singing with musical notes rising, on a branch
images.issue: spec asked for a generic 'happy open-mouthed songbird'; a wren works fine and matches the week's bird motif

images.depicts: open book with a red ribbon bookmark, pages fanned
shovel mid-dig flinging dirt/sand into the air
small rabbit frozen mid-leap in the air

line_map.line: One cat… two CATS! One dog… two DOGS! One dish… two DISHES!

line_map.line: running… played… wishes… Every word can grow!
